title: Simpler Ghasts [16x]
description: Brings back the simple 16x16 Ghasts in Minecraft.
body:
# DON'T LIKE THE NEW GHAST TEXTURES?
### Simpler Ghasts got you covered :D !

**"Simpler Gasts"** restores the original 16 by 16 textures to the Ghasts while also updating it to its modern look!
![32x vs 16x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f11a3a2e53a8ddcc714bc582f5eba2d594653244_0.webp)
### Guess what? THERE'S MORE!
We also simplified the **Ghast Harness!**
So now you and your Happy Guast can have fun, knowing your Happy Ghasts retains its derpy, low-resolution look :D
![baby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6efd9835d0974bb941ece51599bde22a330e17a2_0.webp)
### Happy Flying ;) !!!
